case_for: Adams has a history of big-target volume and explosive upside, as shown by his 37.6 and 26.0 point outings this season, giving him a strong ceiling if he sees a heavy target share again.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 6.0 points and his most recent 6.0-point performance suggest a diminished or uncertain role (likely tied to his new team/QB situation), making a jump to 12+ points unlikely.
